name: LIQUIDIOT
description: LIQUIDIOT is a Solana-based token accompanied by a real-time transparency dashboard (liquidiot.app) that visualizes liquidity provider activity as market signals. The dashboard tracks how dedicated LP positions programmatically rebalance — buying tokens at lower prices and selling at higher prices — against market cap over time, presenting this data through interactive charts with buy/sell event overlays, timeframe filtering, and per-transaction detail. The project's core economic mechanic directs 100% of claimed creator fees into pairing SOL against an existing LP token reserve, which deepens on-chain liquidity through protocol activity rather than discretionary buybacks or manual market-making. The token launched via Pump.fun's bonding curve, graduated to Raydium, and maintains a supplemental Orca concentrated liquidity pool. All LP behavior, creator fee pairing, and pool value data are surfaced publicly through the dashboard in real time.
